explanations.3: This tells the system to process all files ending in .qmd (Quarto markdown files) and turn them into presentations.
explanations.13: This setting makes slides progress linearly one after another instead of allowing free navigation between them.
explanations.18: This controls which heading level (in this case, the smallest heading size, level 6) will create a new slide.
explanations.19: This displays the slide number as 'current slide / total slides' (like '3/10') at the bottom of each slide.
explanations.22: This sets a background image for your title slide using a file path to a webp image in an images folder.
